title: JUKF-047 Serious and innocent girl's worries "Tell me your teacher" Ichika-chan (A cup) Ichika Matsumoto
description: Around the age of a girl, Ichika-chan was unknowingly worried because she couldn't keep up with the naughty topics of her classmates. One day, I took the plunge and visited the teacher's home on a holiday to have my homeroom teacher teach me about sex. However, the teacher is a genuine amorous teacher who goes to customs every week, and at first he tried to get rid of Ichika who visited the teacher's home to go to customs, but he changed his mind and took advantage of her curiosity and the development process Playing with her body, the girl also truly receives what the teacher says and controls herself ...
